title: պահել
definition: to keep, to hold, to hide, to maintain, to support.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian պահեմ (pahem, “to keep, to guard”).

title: պաչ
new_etymology: Of imitative origin; compare with similar words in other languages.

title: պառավ
definition: old man or woman (usually old woman), aged.

title: պատել
definition: to wrap, to overlay, to cover.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian պատեմ (patem, “to cover, to overlay”).

title: պարապ
new_etymology: From Iranian origin; compare Persian فارغ‎ (fāregh, “free, idle”).

title: պարետ
definition: commandant (of a fortress or town), superintendent.

title: պիտո
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: պլոր
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: պոռոչ
new_etymology: Of imitative origin; compare with similar words in other languages.

title: պուց
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: պպզել
definition: to squat, to sit on hind legs.
new_etymology: Of imitative origin; compare with similar words in other languages.

title: պտտել
definition: to rotate, to turn, to stroll, to amble.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian պտտեմ (pttem, “to turn, to rotate”).

title: ջանալ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ջանամ (janam, “to try, to strive”).

title: ջիղ
definition: nerve, tendon, sinew, muscle, talent, power.

title: ջնջել
definition: to wipe off, to clean, to delete, to erase, to destroy, to cross out.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian ջնջեմ (jnjem, “to erase, to wipe out”).

title: սահել
definition: to slide, to glide, to skid.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian սահեմ (sahem, “to slide, to glide”).

title: սեզ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: սկա
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: սոսափ
new_etymology: Of imitative origin; compare with similar words in other languages.

title: սովոր
new_etymology: From Old Armenian սովոր (sovor, “accustomed, used to”).

title: սուղ
new_etymology: From Old Armenian սուղ (suł, “dear, costly, expensive”).

title: սրճել
new_etymology: Borrowed from Turkish kahve içmek (“to drink coffee”).

title: սփռել
definition: to spread, to scatter, to strew.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian սփռեմ (spʿrem, “to spread, to scatter”).

title: վառել
definition: to set on fire, to burn, to light.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian վառեմ (varrem, “to burn, to light”).

title: վարել
definition: to plough, to conduct, to manage, to drive.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian վարեմ (varem, “to plough, to conduct”).

title: վեշնի
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: վիժել
definition: to miscarry, to abort, to throw down, to flow, to spout out.
new_etymology: From Old Armenian վիժեմ (vižem, “to miscarry, to abort”).

title: վռազ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.

title: վրեպ
new_etymology: Of uncertain origin; possibly from regional dialects.
